problem: How to predict drug-receptor binding affinity from molecular structure without wet lab?
hypothesis: Homomorphic encryption for private computation may resolve How to predict drug-receptor binding affinity from molecular structure without wet lab? by activating at the systems level.

experiment.protocol: Security audit with 1 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
